overall.description: A nighttime drive through a rain-soaked futuristic city highway in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily along an elevated road, passing under an overpass with red warning lights and alongside glowing digital billboards, with tall glass skyscrapers visible through the hazy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with distant city skyline

events.description: camera turns slightly left while navigating the highway curve
approaching concrete overpass structure with overhead signage

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the rain-soaked highway, navigating a gentle left curve toward an overpass

entered.detail: concrete barrier running along the right edge of the elevated highway
tall illuminated building visible through the rain and fog
row of yellow-orange street lamps illuminating the wet road surface
blue digital highway sign indicating direction to Rancho Coronado

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night, with the camera driving forward through heavy rain. Yellow street lights illuminate the wet asphalt while a glass skyscraper looms in the foggy distance. The vehicle navigates a gentle left curve as it approaches an overpass structure, with highway signs for Rancho Coronado visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with red warning lights

events.description: entering the shadow of the overpass, ambient light drops significantly as red warning lights become prominent
exiting the covered overpass back into open rain and artificial street lighting

agents.ego_description: passing under the massive concrete overpass structure with red warning lights overhead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars spanning the road
row of bright red lights mounted on the overpass structure
overhead gantry sign with directional arrows pointing to Santo Domingo

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a semi-covered underpass where the ambient light shifts to a darker, mixed lighting environment dominated by red warning lights overhead. The concrete structure creates a sheltered space from the rain. After passing beneath the overpass, the scene transitions back to open highway with building lights visible on the right as the vehicle exits the covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with digital billboards and advertisements

events.description: large illuminated billboard with 'SCREAMTACULAR' advertisement becomes prominent on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open highway past illuminated digital advertisements and street lights

entered.detail: large screen displaying colorful advertisements on the left side of the highway
bright digital billboard featuring cartoon characters and 'SCREAMTACULAR' text
pedestrian bridge or walkway structure with railings on the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the open rain-soaked highway, with the vehicle driving past rows of street lights and digital billboards. A large 'SCREAMTACULAR' advertisement becomes prominent on the right side, illuminating the wet surroundings with colorful neon light. The highway stretches ahead through the hazy night, with distant overpasses and building lights visible through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-soaked elevated highway that transitions from an open, foggy cityscape into a sheltered underpass before emerging into a neon-lit urban corridor. It begins by navigating a gentle left curve through heavy rain, where yellow street lights reflect off the wet asphalt and a glass skyscraper looms in the distance. As the vehicle approaches an overpass, the scene shifts into a semi-covered concrete structure where the ambient light turns dark and is dominated by overhead red warning lights. The camera then exits the shelter, returning to the open highway as the lighting brightens with the glow of city buildings on the right. Finally, the drive continues past rows of street lights and a prominent, colorful SCREAMTACULAR digital billboard that illuminates the hazy, rain-streaked night.
